sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, value String, created_at DateTime, amount Float64, score Nullable(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;

SELECT count() FROM s3('https://datasets-documentation.s3.eu-west-3.amazonaws.com/mta/*.tsv', 'your_access_key_id', 'your_secret_access_key', 'TSVWithNames') WHERE amount <= (SELECT MAX(amount) FROM test_data WHERE score IS NOT NULL);

SELECT avg(amount) FROM test_data GROUP BY value HAVING avg(amount) <= (SELECT count() FROM s3('https://datasets-documentation.s3.eu-west-3.amazonaws.com/mta/*.tsv', 'CSVWithNames', extra_credentials(role_arn = 'arn:aws:iam::111111111111:role/ClickHouseAccessRole-001'));
SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY AND value <= '150.75';

SELECT id, count(*) FROM (SELECT id, value, score FROM test_data WHERE score IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT id, 'default' AS value, NULL AS score FROM test_data WHERE score IS NULL) AS combined GROUP BY id HAVING count(*) <= 3;
CREATE TABLE secondary_data (s_id UInt32, s_value Nullable(Float64), FOREIGN KEY (s_id) REFERENCES test_data(id)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY s_id;
SELECT a.id, a.value, b.s_value FROM test_data AS a JOIN secondary_data AS b ON a.id <= b.s_id WHERE a.amount <= CAST(s_value AS Float64) OR s_value IS NULL;
SELECT count() FROM s3('https://datasets-documentation.s3.eu-west-3.amazonaws.com/mta/*.tsv', 'your_access_key_id', 'your_secret_access_key', 'TSVWithNames') WHERE value <= 'abc' AND amount IS NULL;
